info.title: coco-reasoner
info.description: Combined deduCtiOn and abduCtiOn (CoCo) reasoner is a dual-process inspired cognitive architecture built in Rust

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available classes in the knowledge base.

post.description: Create a new class in the knowledge base.

400.description: Invalid class data in request body

403.description: Forbidden - only admin users can create new classes

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific class by its name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the class to retrieve

post.description: Authenticate a user with their username and password, returns access and refresh JWT tokens if successful.

200.description: User authenticated successfully, returns access and refresh JWT tokens

500.description: Failed to retrieve current user profile

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available objects in the knowledge base.

post.description: Create a new object in the knowledge base.

400.description: Invalid object data in request body

403.description: Forbidden - only admin users can create new objects

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific object by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the object to retrieve

403.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to access this object

patch.description: Update the properties of an existing object.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the object to update

400.description: Invalid property values in request body

403.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to modify this object

get.description: Retrieve data values for a specific object, optionally filtered by a time range.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the object to retrieve data for

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start of the time range filter (optional)

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End of the time range filter (optional)

200.description: List of data values for the object

403.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to access this object's data

post.description: Add new data values to an existing object.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the object to update

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Timestamp for the data being added (optional, defaults to current time)

400.description: Invalid data values in request body

403.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to modify this object

500.description: Failed to add data to object

get.description: Retrieve the OpenAPI specification for this API.

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access and refresh JWT token pair.
Create a new user account with a username, password, and role.

200.description: User registered successfully, returns access and refresh JWT tokens

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available rules in the knowledge base.

post.description: Create a new rule in the knowledge base.

400.description: Invalid rule data in request body

403.description: Forbidden - only admin users can create new rules

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific rule by its name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the rule to retrieve

get.description: Retrieve a list of all registered users (admin only).

403.description: Forbidden - only admin users can view the list of users

post.description: Create a new user account with a username, password, and role (admin only). Role defaults to user.

400.description: Invalid user data in request body

403.description: Forbidden - only admin users can create new users

patch.description: Update an existing user's role and permissions (admin only).

400.description: Invalid user data in request body

403.description: Forbidden - only admin users can update users

get.description: Retrieve a user's profile. Accessible only by admin users or by the user themselves.

403.description: Forbidden - only admin users or the user themselves can view this profile

get.description: Establish a WebSocket connection for real-time updates.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user registration and login

tags.name: Classes
tags.description: Operations related to knowledge base classes

tags.name: Objects
tags.description: Operations related to knowledge base objects

tags.name: Rules
tags.description: Operations related to knowledge base rules
